entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The staple cereal crop Sorghum bicolor studied for genetic diversity in Niger

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the spatio-temporal analysis of sorghum genetic diversity was conducted

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The center of origin of sorghum

entities.name: SAHEL COUNTRIES
entities.description: Region facing human, environmental, and social changes suspected to cause genetic erosion

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic characteristics within the sorghum population

entities.name: GENETIC EROSION
entities.description: The loss of genetic diversity due to human, environmental, and social changes

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Recurrent periods of water shortage that Niger was submitted to

entities.name: SPATIO-TEMPORAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of genetic diversity across different locations and time periods

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to investigate changes in genetic diversity

entities.name: SPATIAL AND GENETIC CLUSTERING
entities.description: Methods applied to investigate changes in genetic diversity over a 26-year period

entities.name: FST
entities.description: A statistic used to measure genetic differentiation between collections and clusters

entities.name: ALLELIC RICHNESS
entities.description: A measure of genetic diversity that showed stability or increase in most spatial clusters

entities.name: BAYESIAN ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to identify genetic clusters and their distribution of accessions

entities.name: FARMERS' MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Human management practices that globally preserved sorghum genetic diversity in Niger

entities.name: RAINFALL GRADIENT
entities.description: The variation in rainfall across the 71 villages studied in Niger

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The range of environmental conditions in Niger's agricultural areas
